ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the company's profile */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Category code for the company (e.g., software, health) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "last_funding_round" INTEGER /* ID of the last funding round the company received */,
  "total_funding_amount_usd" REAL /* Total amount of funding the company has received in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_category_code FOREIGN KEY ("category_code") REFERENCES company_categories ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the investor's profile */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Category code for the investor (e.g., financial-organization) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the investor's location */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code for the investor's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the investor's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for the investor's location */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the investor was established */,
  "investor_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the investor */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the investor organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the investor's website */,
  "investment_focus" TEXT /* Main areas of investment focus */,
  "total_investments" INTEGER /* Total number of investments made by the investor */,
  "total_investment_amount_usd" REAL /* Total amount of investments made by the investor in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investors_category_code FOREIGN KEY ("category_code") REFERENCES investor_categories ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "funding_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that received funding */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who provided funding */,
  "funding_round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., series A, series C+, other) */,
  "funded_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the funding round was completed */,
  "funded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the funding round was completed */,
  "raised_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of funding raised in USD */,
  "pre_money_valuation_usd" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the company before the funding round */,
  "post_money_valuation_usd" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the company after the funding round */,
  "funding_round_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the funding round */,
  "lead_investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead investor in the funding round */,
  "num_investors" INTEGER /* Number of investors involved in the funding round */,
  "funding_round_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding round (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_lead_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_funding_round_type FOREIGN KEY ("funding_round_type") REFERENCES funding_round_types ("funding_round_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_investments" (
  "investor_investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who made the investment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that received the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, exited) */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was exited (if applicable) */,
  "exit_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount received upon exiting the investment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_investments_exit_amount_usd FOREIGN KEY ("exit_amount_usd") REFERENCES investor_investments ("investment_amount_usd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_round_types" (
  "funding_round_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round type */,
  "funding_round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., series A, series C+, other) */,
  "funding_round_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the funding round type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_round_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region the state belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region the city belongs to */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state the city belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id")
)
